rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.155 governs judicial campaign contribution limits. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 253.155. CONTRIBUTION LIMITS. (a) A judicial candidate or officeholder may not knowingly accept political contributions from a person that, in the aggregate, exceed the contribution limits prescribed by Subsection (b) in connection with each election in which the judicial candidate's name appears on the ballot.
_note: No conflict; proposed Tax Code change is unrelated to judicial contribution limits.
